channel.title: Personal on Lean Deep Tech blog
channel.description: Recent content in Personal on Lean Deep Tech blog

item.title: My intership has been transformed into a regular job!
item.description:
I have been employed!

I haven’t written an article in a while. I have to admit I haven’t had much time. I’ve been busy exploring, learning, working at Schneider Electric, and writing my internship report. My trip is now coming to an end, and I have to return to France to finish my studies. I still have a year and a half left before I can graduate.

My stay here has been incredible and truly life changing. I’ve learned so much, enjoyed every moment, and met amazing people it’s very hard for me to leave and go back to France.

item.title: Silicon valley here I am!
item.description:
New job


I’ve just arrived in San Francisco, more precisely in Alameda. As part of my engineering studies, I need to complete a 9 month international internship to validate my degree.

Although I chose a general engineering school with a joint program with a business school, I’ve always been passionate about computer science and programming. I started coding my first website at 13 by borrowing an HTML book and using FrontPage, then Dreamweaver. So naturally, coming to Silicon Valley felt like the obvious choice.
